properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v6 v3 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Sometimes you've gotta dance through the darkness Sing through the fire Praise when it don't make sense Sometimes you've gotta stare down the giant Worship from the lion's den

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Sometimes you've gotta shout it from the mountain Louder in the valley Trusting that He's gonna get you there, sometimes you've gotta welcome the wonder, wait for the answer Worship with your hands in the air

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'll praise You anywhere Praise, give Him praise, give Him praise In my highest grace, give Him praise, give Him praise In my highest, He is worthy Yes, He is worthy of all of the praise

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Sometimes you've gotta praise in the prison Cry out to heaven Shout it 'til the doors swing wide, sometimes you've gotta stand on your shackles, brave in the battle Worship with your hands held high

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Faithful all my life Blessings day and night Countless reasons why I'll praise You anywhere

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Every promise kept Goodness every step Each and every breath I'll praise You anywhere

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Oh, I'll praise You anywhere Oh, mountain, oh, valley I know that You're with me there I'll praise You anywhere
